# Defined Or

Defined-or operator for handling undef values

```perl
$result = $value // $default;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Defined Or

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$result = $value // $default;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$result = $value // $default;
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
